Text: Mary introduced me to Charles, to mathematics taken seriously, and to the idea that a woman might publish without apology. Her work on celestial mechanics does not need my endorsement, but it has it.
Worked with Quill on a project of mutual interest. Consistently delivered strong work. Recommended.
